name: Spanish Hot Dogs and Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Hot dogs, sliced 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice according to package instructions.
2. While the rice is cooking, slice hot dogs into pieces about 1/2 inch thick (about 1/2 pound or more).
3. Dice the green pepper and onion as desired.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
5. Heat the mixture until warmed through.
6. Serve with the cooked rice and enjoy.
